heading: Effective date of insurance
label: 1909 Effective date of insurance
text: Insurance may be made effective, as specified in the application, not later than the first day of the calendar month following the date of application therefor, but the United States shall not be liable thereunder for death occurring before such effective date.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 709 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 709 of this title
